summary: Iteration 23: Advanced Statistics Dashboard & Email Notifications Testing. All features verified working correctly.

backend_advanced_stats_api.details: Returns all required fields: revenue_this_month, revenue_last_month, revenue_change_pct, reservations_this_month, reservations_last_month, avg_booking_duration, avg_revenue_per_reservation, vehicle_utilization, revenue_per_vehicle, daily_revenue, new_clients_30d, payment_methods, cancellation_rate, weekly_trends

backend_status_change_notification.details: Status update triggers both in-app notification (verified in MongoDB) and email notification (attempted send, fails due to unverified domain as expected)

admin_statistics_page.details: Page loads with title 'Statistiques Avancées', KPI cards (Revenue, Reservations, Duration, Cart avg), Bar charts (Daily Revenue, Weekly Trend), Vehicle Utilization bars, Payment methods donut chart

agency_app_statistics_page.details: Page loads with title 'Statistiques', KPI cards with themed colors, Bar chart for daily revenue, Vehicle utilization bars, Top revenues list, Payment donut chart, Cancellation rate and new clients stats

super_admin_statistics_page.details: Page loads with title 'Statistiques Globales', Global KPIs including Agencies count (9), Weekly trends chart, Vehicle utilization for all vehicles across agencies

admin_layout.details: Statistiques tab visible in horizontal nav bar, navigates to /admin/statistics

agency_app_layout.details: Stats tab visible in tab bar with chart icon, navigates to /agency-app/statistics

super_admin_layout.details: Statistiques tab visible in nav bar, navigates to /super-admin/statistics

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 statistics pages are fully functional. Backend API /api/admin/stats/advanced returns complete dataset with revenue, utilization, payment methods etc. Email notifications are triggered on status change but will fail with domain verification error (expected - Resend domain not verified). In-app notifications are created successfully in MongoDB.
email_notification_note: Email sending via Resend fails with 'The logitrak.ch domain is not verified' error - this is EXPECTED behavior as noted in review request. The code path is correct and email is attempted.
